headline: Has Allegro MicroSystems (ALGM) Outpaced Other Computer and Technology Stocks This Year?
summary: Here is how Allegro MicroSystems, Inc. (ALGM) and Jabil (JBL) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

headline: Jabil to Present at Upcoming Investor Conference
summary: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., May 12, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), a global leader in engineering, supply chain, and manufacturing solutions, today announced it is scheduled to participate in a fireside chat at the J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 10:45 AM EDT.
